title: Stop and check risk
summary: Do not start work around electricity, gas, structure or major leaks.
steps: Secure the area only if safe.
Take a photo and contact a professional.
warnings: This app does not guide high-risk work.

title: High risk — safe decision
summary: The full plan is to secure the area and call a professional.
steps: Do not start the repair yourself.
Close the main water valve only if you know how and can reach it safely.
If you smell gas, leave and call emergency help.
For electricity, switch off the breaker only if safe.

title: Squeaky door
summary: First clean and lightly lubricate the hinge.
warnings: Do not use too much oil.

title: Squeaky door — full guide
summary: Fix squeaking without removing the door.
steps: Put a cloth under the hinge.
Clean the hinge with a brush.
Apply a small amount of lubricant.
Stop if the hinge is bent.
dontDo: do not remove heavy doors alone

title: Loose hinge
summary: Check screws and material around the hinge.
steps: Check whether the hinge still moves.

title: Loose hinge — full guide
summary: Plan for a cabinet, light front or light door.
steps: If the screw spins, the hole is worn.
For light furniture choose a longer screw.
Stop with heavy doors or cracks.
dontDo: do not use full power driver

title: Small furniture scratch
summary: Clean the surface and check if the scratch is shallow.
warnings: Test product in a hidden place.

title: Furniture scratch — full guide
summary: Safe masking of a small scratch.
steps: For antiques or deep scratches consider help.
dontDo: do not sand without a plan

title: Clogged drain
summary: Start with simple methods without harsh chemicals.
warnings: For backup or flooding call a plumber.

title: Clogged drain — full guide
summary: Safe plan for a light clog.
steps: Clean accessible trap only if you can reassemble it.
Stop if there is leak or sewage smell.

title: Replace silicone
summary: Remove loose silicone and dry the place.
steps: Do not apply on wet surface.
warnings: Mold or hidden leak needs broader check.

title: Silicone — full guide
summary: Replace a small silicone section.
dontDo: do not cover mold with silicone

title: Refresh grout
summary: Check if grout is dirty or damaged.
warnings: Crumbling grout may mean a bigger issue.

title: Grout — full guide
summary: Refresh stable grout between tiles.

title: Zipper
summary: Check if fabric is caught in the slider.

title: Zipper — full guide
summary: Safe steps for a stuck zipper.
steps: Move slider back millimeter by millimeter.
If teeth are missing, go to tailor.
dontDo: do not use oil on delicate fabric

title: Small seal
summary: Find the source and confirm it is a small gap.
steps: Do not seal active leak without diagnosis.
warnings: For water, gas, electricity or structure call a professional.

title: Small seal — full guide
summary: Plan for a small gap without active leak.

title: Safe first step
summary: Start with risk and scope assessment.
steps: Check that it is not an installation issue.
warnings: Do not dismantle parts you do not understand.

title: Universal repair plan
summary: Method for simple low-risk repairs.
steps: If problem returns, call a professional.
